name: Farrah 12x16 Garage Shed Plan - A Compact Garage and Porch Retreat Designed for Charm, Utility & Everyday Function
open_features: A compact yet highly functional layout featuring a full garage bay and an inviting side porch perfect for seating, potting, or seasonal decor.
Simple framing, clean roof lines, and clear instructions make this a great project for beginners and experienced builders alike.
A full-size garage door allows easy access for lawn equipment, small vehicles, bikes, tools, hobby materials, or workshop essentials.
Classic horizontal wood siding, crisp white trim, charming lantern-style lighting, and a cozy porch create a timeless look with modern durability.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Farrah Garage Shed Plan - a 12x16 compact garage and porch combination designed for warm architectural charm, efficient storage, and versatile day-to-day usability. With its classic gable roof, rich wood siding, welcoming covered porch, and single garage bay, the Farrah blends cottage appeal with the practical functionality homeowners love. Whether you're building a small vehicle garage, garden supply hub, hobby workshop, backyard relaxation nook,...
